2026-04-17T03:22:18.4148768Z [36;1m# Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)[0m
2026-04-17T03:22:18.4149210Z [36;1m# Mask immediately to prevent timing vulnerabilities[0m
2026-04-17T03:22:18.4149758Z [36;1mAPI_KEY=$(openssl rand -base64 45 | tr -d '/+=')[0m
2026-04-17T03:22:18.4150062Z [36;1mecho "::add-mask::${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-17T03:22:18.4150296Z [36;1m[0m

Bugs Fixed\n\n### Other Changes\n\n## 1.0.0-beta.3 (2025-12-05)\n\n### Features Added\n- Added support for service version 2025-11-15-preview.\n\n- Added support for service version 2025-11-01.\n\n### Breaking Changes\n- Changed parameter type from `ConversationAuthoringDeleteDeploymentDetails` to `ConversationAuthoringProjectResourceIds` when calling `DeleteDeploymentFromResources`, with property name changed from `AssignedResourceIds` to `AzureResourceIds`.\n\n- Changed function name from `GetDeploymentResources` to `GetProjectResources`, change its return type from `ConversationAuthoringAssignedDeploymentResource` to `ConversationAuthoringAssignedProjectResource`.\n\n- Changed function name from `AssignDeploymentResources` to `AssignProjectResources`, and its parameter type from `ConversationAuthoringAssignDeploymentResourcesDetails` to `ConversationAuthoringAssignProjectResourcesDetails`.\n\n- Changed function name from `UnassignDeploymentResources` to `UnassignProjectResources`, changed its parameter type from `ConversationAuthoringUnassignDeploymentResourcesDetails` to `ConversationAuthoringProjectResourceIds`.\n\n- Changed function name from `GetAssignDeploymentResourcesStatus` to `GetAssignProjectResourcesStatus`, change its return type from `ConversationAuthoringDeploymentResourcesState` to `ConversationAuthoringProjectResourcesState`.\n\n- Changed function name from `GetUnassignDeploymentResourcesStatus` to `GetUnassignProjectResourcesStatus`, change its return type from `ConversationAuthoringDeploymentResourcesState` to `ConversationAuthoringProjectResourcesState`.\n\n- For function `CreateProject`, include `projectName` when constructing `ConversationAuthoringCreateProjectDetails`.\n\n### Other Changes\n- Add samples for the following functions(sync and async):\n    - ListAssignedResourceDeployments\n    - ListProjectResources\n    - DeleteDeploymentFromResources\n    - GetDeploymentDeleteFromResourcesStatus\n\n### Bugs Fixed\n\n- Fixed diagnostic scope names in `ConversationAuthoringProject` methods.\n\n## 1.0.0-beta.2 (2025-07-24)\n\n### Features Added\n\n- Added import feature for raw json string.\n- Added support for Conversations Authoring API Versions\n  - 2025-05-15-preview\n- Added `DataGenerationSettings` in `TrainingJobDetails` when training a model.\n  - Added corresponding test and sample.\n- Added `DataGenerationConnectionInfo` in `DeploymentResource` when deploying a model.\n  - Added corresponding test and sample.\n- Added `ExportedAssociatedEntityLabel` in `ConversationExportedIntent` when importing a project.\n  - Added corresponding test and sample.\n\n### Other Changes\n\n- Added tests and samples for some legacy features.\n  - Get Deployment\n  - Assign Project Resources\n  - Get Assign Project Resources Status\n  - Unassign Project Resources\n  - Get Unassign Project Resources Status\n\n## 1.0.0-beta.1 (2025-03-04)\n\n### Other Changes\n\n- Initial release of Azure.AI.Language.Conversations.Authoring library.\n","uri":"repo://Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/sha/[REDACTED]/contents/sdk/cognitivelanguage/Azure.AI.Language.Conversations.Authoring/CHANGELOG.md"},"type":"resource"}]}}}
2026-04-17T03:26:45.4692609Z {"timestamp":"2026-04-17T03:23:49.291703541Z","direction":"IN","type":"RESPONSE","server_id":"github","payload":{"id":1,"jsonrpc":"2.0","result":{"content":[{"text":"successfully downloaded text file (SHA: [REDACTED])","type":"text"},{"resource":{"mimeType":"text/plain; charset=utf-8","text":"# Azure Authoring client library for .NET\n\nAzure Conversations Authoring is part of the Azure Cognitive Service for Language, a cloud-based service that provides tools for creating, managing, and deploying conversational AI solutions. This client library offers the following features:\n\n* Creating and managing conversation projects\n* Importing conversation projects\n* Exporting conversation projects\n* Getting project details\n* Deleting projects\n* Training models for conversational AI\n* Canceling active training jobs\n* Evaluating model summaries\n* Evaluating model results\n* Managing project snapshots\n* Loading snapshots\n* Deploying conversational AI models\n* Swapping deployments for active models\n* Deleting trained models\n* Deleting deployments\n* Assigning project resources\n* Getting deployment resource assignment status\n* Unassigning project resources\n* Getting deployment resource unassignment status\n\n[Source code][source_root] | [Package (NuGet)][package]| [API reference documentation][text_refdocs] | [Product documentation][text_docs] | [Samples][source_samples]\n\n## Getting started\n\nThis section should include everything a developer needs to do to install and create their first client connection *very quickly*.\n\n### Install the package\n\nInstall the client library for .NET with [NuGet](https://www.nuget.org/ ):\n\n```dotnetcli\ndotnet add package Azure.AI.Language.Conversations.Authoring --prerelease\n```\n\n|SDK version  |Supported API version of service\n|-------------|----------------------------------------------------------------------\n|1.0.0-beta.1 | 2023-04-01, 2023-04-15-preview, 2024-11-15-preview (default)\n|1.0.0-beta.2 | 2023-04-01, 2023-04-15-preview, 2024-11-15-preview, 2025-05-15-preview (default)\n|1.0.0-beta.3 | 2023-04-01, 2025-11-01, 2025-05-15-preview, 2025-11-15-preview (default)\n\n### Prerequisites\n\n* An [Azure subscription][azure_sub].\n* An existing Cognitive Services or Language service resource.\n\n### Authenticate the client\n\nIn order to interact with the Conversations Authoring service, you'll need to create an instance of the [`ConversationAnalysisAuthoring`][ConversationAnalysisAuthoring_class] class. You will need an **endpoint**, and an **API key** to instantiate a client object. For more information regarding authenticating with Cognitive Services, see [Authenticate requests to Azure Cognitive Services][cognitive_auth].\n\n#### Get an API key\n\nYou can get the `endpoint` and `API key` from the Cognitive Services resource or Language service resource information in the [Azure Portal][azure_portal].\n\nAlternatively, use the [Azure CLI][azure_cli] snippet below to get the API key from the Language service resource.\n\n```PowerShell\naz cognitiveservices account keys list --resource-group \u003cyour-resource-group-name\u003e --name \u003cyour-resource-name\u003e\n```\n\n#### Create a AnalyzeConversationAuthoring Client\n\nTo use the AnalyzeConversationAuthoring client, include the following namespace in your project:\n\n```C#\nusing Azure.AI.Language.Conversations.Authoring;\n```\n\nWith your endpoint and API key, you can instantiate a `ConversationAnalysisAuthoring` client using specific service options:\n\n```C# Snippet:CreateAuthoringClientForSpecificApiVersion\nUri endpoint = new Uri(\"{endpoint}\");\nAzureKeyCredential credential = new AzureKeyCredential(\"{api-key}\");\nConversationAnalysisAuthoringClientOptions options = new ConversationAnalysisAuthoringClientOptions(ConversationAnalysisAuthoringClientOptions.ServiceVersion.V2025_11_15_Preview);\nConversationAnalysisAuthoring client = new ConversationAnalysisAuthoring(endpoint, credential, options);\n```\n\n#### Create a client using Azu
